name: Vera's Roofing LLC

contact.preferredLeadPath: Request an inspection with the town, property type, roof or gutter concern, and photos if available.

serviceAreaSummary: Nearby coastal North Carolina communities including Leland, Oak Island, Southport, Shallotte, Carolina Beach, Kure Beach, and Wrightsville Beach
services: Hand-nailed shingle work when included in the agreed scope
CertainTeed ShingleMaster credentialed roofing company and roof-system planning questions
EPDM rubber membrane work for flat and low-slope roof areas
claimBoundaries: Do not infer prices, response times, insurance outcomes, warranty eligibility, FORTIFIED project eligibility, or service availability for an exact address.
CertainTeed warranty availability depends on selected materials, full roof system, installation requirements, registration, property type, transfer rules, exclusions, and CertainTeed's written terms.

FORTIFIED Home references are limited to program-requirements conversations when they apply; exam completion is not itself a blanket contractor certification or project designation. Any FORTIFIED designation depends on current program rules, eligible scope, documentation, evaluator verification, and project-specific review. No FORTIFIED designation or insurance benefit is promised.
